title: Sweet Argentinian Dulce De Leche Empanadas
description: Tangy and crumbly empanadas filled with dulce de leche, a nostalgic Argentinian dish now vegan-friendly

ingredients.name: all purpose flour
ingredients.notes: make sure it is vegan friendly

instructions: In a large mixing bowl combine flour, salt, and sugar
Add melted vegan butter, apple cider vinegar, and water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle
Place a tablespoon of dulce de leche in the center of each circle
Fold the dough over the dulce de leche and press the edges together to seal the empanada
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Bake the empanadas for 20 minutes or until golden brown
